headline: CNBC Daily Open: Markets hold breath as Trump's Iran deadline nears
summary: Oil prices rose again as President Donald Trump stepped up his threats against Iran if Tehran does not come to a deal on the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: U.S. crude oil rises as Trump makes ominous threat against Iran ahead of deadline
summary: Oil prices rose after President Donald Trump threatened to destroy Iran's civilization if his 8 p.m. ET deadline is not met.

headline: Asia-Pacific markets trade mixed as investors assess Trump's hardened rhetoric on Iran war
summary: Trump renewed threats on targeting Iran's civilian infrastructure if a peace deal is not reached in less than 24 hours, while signaling Iranian leadership is negotiating in earnest.

headline: Stocks slide, oil gains as Trump's Iran deadline approaches: Live updates
summary: Stocks fell on Tuesday as President Donald Trump's deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz approached, with hopes of an agreement fading.

headline: Trump's Iran ultimatum and signals of a possible deal keep investors on tenterhooks
summary: Investors head into what could be the most consequential week of the Iran conflict, scrambling to position for binary outcomes: an imminent deal or further escalation.
